pages.text: What the Despoil table yields, and what each part is for. Drops are weighted — common mobs give common parts.
pages.title: Spoils of the Body

pages.text: $(bold)Fibres & tissue:$()$(br)$(li)$(flesh)Sinew$() — elastic fibre tissue; the bread-and-butter drop.$(li)$(flesh)Tough Fibers$() / $(flesh)Elastic Fibers$() — the two refined fibre grades the machines spend.$(li)$(flesh)Flesh Bits$() — loose organic matter; a near-universal crafting filler.

$(bold)Hard parts:$()$(br)$(li)$(flesh)Sharp Fang$() / $(flesh)Sharp Claw$() — cutting parts; needed for the Bio-Forge and Cradle, and for several weapons.$(li)$(flesh)Bone Marrow$() — rich in hormones and minerals. $(flesh)Withered Bone Marrow$() is its undead form.$(li)$(flesh)Bone Fragments$() / $(flesh)Mineral Fragment$() / $(flesh)Gem Fragments$() — the mineral side of the harvest.

$(bold)Glands & fluids:$()$(br)$(li)$(flesh)Bile Gland$() — generic gland; decomposes into Bile.$(li)$(flesh)Toxin Gland$() / $(flesh)Volatile Gland$() — specialised glands. The Cradle reads these as $(italic)disease$(): see $(l:2_cradle/offerings)A Table of Offerings$().$(li)$(flesh)Bioluminescent Goo$() — light-bearing tissue, for lanterns.
pages.title: Glands

pages.text: $(bold)Pressing the Toxin Gland.$() Beyond the Cradle, the $(flesh)Toxin Gland$() has an industrial use. Drop one in a Create $(bold)Basin$() with a $(bold)Mechanical Press$() running above — a compacting recipe — and it renders into $(bold)250 mb of Tinkers' Venom$().$(br2)A spider or bee farm feeding a press becomes a quiet, automatable Venom supply, with no need to court the Cradle for it.
pages.title: Gland to Venom

pages.text: Most of these can also be made without hunting at all — the $(l:3_machines/decomposer)Decomposer$() breaks bulk organic matter down into fibres and fragments once you have it running. The harvest is how you $(italic)start$(); the machines are how you scale.
pages.title: The Other Source
